chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Const. Petition No.D-3643 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs Direction For orders as to maintainability of petition ---------------------------------------------- 10.10.2025 This matter was last taken up on 11.09.2024, when another counsel held brief for Mr. Khalilullah Jakhro, learned counsel for petitioner. In the last more than one year, learned counsel for petitioner has not pursued this petition diligently. Even the question of maintainability remains outstanding. Today again, despite lapse of more than one year, learned counsel for petitioner is called absent. It appears that the learned counsel for the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this petition, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution along with all pending application(s), if any. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES J U D G E Gulsher/PS
